description: Generates connectors between dungeon areas for grand palaces and castle interiors. Use when characters move between areas in opulent, constructed environments.

descriptionTranslations.en: Generates connectors between dungeon areas for grand palaces and castle interiors. Use when characters move between areas in opulent, constructed environments.

entries.description: Instead of a Connector, the Area your Character is leaving leads directly to another Area.

descriptionTranslations.en: Instead of a Connector, the Area your Character is leaving leads directly to another Area.

entries.description: The Connector is what you would most expect it to be given the current context.

descriptionTranslations.en: The Connector is what you would most expect it to be given the current context.

entries.description: The Connector is the same as the last Connector you generated. If this is the first Connector, treat as Expected.

descriptionTranslations.en: The Connector is the same as the last Connector you generated. If this is the first Connector, treat as Expected.

entries.description: Same as the last Connector but with a branching path or intersection.

descriptionTranslations.en: Same as the last Connector but with a branching path or intersection.

entries.result: Same, with a curve or turn

resultTranslations.en: Same, with a curve or turn

entries.description: Same as the last Connector but with a curve or turn along the way.

descriptionTranslations.en: Same as the last Connector but with a curve or turn along the way.

entries.description: Same as the last Connector but with an optional side Area to explore.

descriptionTranslations.en: Same as the last Connector but with an optional side Area to explore.

entries.description: Roll on the Descriptions Meaning Tables for inspiration on what this Connector could be. Allow this result to give you something unusual.

descriptionTranslations.en: Roll on the Descriptions Meaning Tables for inspiration on what this Connector could be. Allow this result to give you something unusual.
